title: neurogramma elaphoglossoides
intro: Neurogramma elaphoglossoides, also known as the Elaphoglossum fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Neurogramma elaphoglossoides include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cognitive function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. Neurogramma elaphoglossoides can be prepared for consumption as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine in various parts of the world.
